drivers.notes: 6.5" foam-core; 2.5-way configuration with single 2.7 kHz crossover

description.en: 2.5-way Reserve floorstander — 1" Pinnacle ring-radiator tweeter over twin 6.5" Turbine-cone woofers with a single 2.7 kHz crossover. Floor-firing Power Port with X-Port technology delivers down-tuned bass extension to 43 Hz at 87.5 dB sensitivity.
description.es: Floorstander Reserve de 2.5 vías — tweeter Pinnacle de anillo radiante de 1" sobre dos woofers Turbine Cone de 6,5" con un único crossover a 2,7 kHz. Power Port de tiro inferior con tecnología X-Port que extiende los graves a 43 Hz, con 87,5 dB de sensibilidad.
